hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. is a global technology company headquartered in Sarajevo, delivering cutting-edge software solutions to enterprises across three continents.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We help organizations turn ambitious ideas into reliable digital products that create measurable business value.
points: Align technology delivery with clear business outcomes.
Build long-term systems that remain maintainable as teams scale.
Partner closely with stakeholders from strategy through execution.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Our multidisciplinary teams combine engineering depth with product thinking across modern technology stacks.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and resilient infrastructure.
Applied AI/ML, data workflows, and IoT-enabled products.

approach.title: Approach
approach.description: We execute with a transparent, iterative model that keeps delivery predictable while reducing product risk.
points: Discover: define scope, priorities, and success metrics early.
Build: ship in focused increments with continuous feedback loops.
Optimize: monitor outcomes and improve performance over time.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.description: Join the growing list of companies that trust Horizon Tech to deliver innovative solutions and exceptional results.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.description: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to discuss how we can help bring your ideas to life.

custom.title: Custom Solutions
custom.description: Looking for a tailored solution? We work closely with clients to understand unique needs and deliver custom software that drives measurable results.

faq.title: Have More Questions?
faq.description: Check out our FAQ section for quick answers

hero.description: A diverse team of technologists, designers, and strategists building high-impact digital products together.

section.title: Leadership Team
section.description: The experienced leaders guiding Horizon Tech's vision and growth

hamza.bio: Visionary leader and technical architect with 10+ years in enterprise software, specializing in AI/ML, cloud platforms, and scalable product architecture.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity specialist focused on enterprise security architecture, secure on-prem infrastructure, and compliance-first delivery for regulated environments.

culture.title: Life at Horizon Tech
culture.description: We foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning

remoteFirst.title: Remote-First Culture
remoteFirst.description: Work from anywhere with flexible hours and a focus on results, not location.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Environment
collaborative.description: Regular team events, knowledge sharing sessions, and cross-functional collaboration.

workLife.title: Work-Life Balance
workLife.description: Generous vacation policy, mental health support, and respect for personal time.

innovation.title: Innovation Time
innovation.description: 20% time for personal projects, hackathons, and exploring new technologies.

cta.title: Want to Join Our Team?
cta.description: We're always looking for talented people who care about craftsmanship, ownership, and innovation.

hero.description: Join a team of engineers building cutting-edge software for global clients. Work remotely, grow continuously, and make real impact.

process.title: Our Hiring Process
process.description: Transparent, efficient, and respectful of your time

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Submit your application and we'll review it within 3 business days.

steps.title: Initial Chat
steps.description: A 30-minute video call to discuss your experience and expectations.

steps.title: Technical
steps.description: Technical interview or practical exercise to showcase your skills.

steps.title: Offer
steps.description: Meet the team and receive your offer to join Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Open Positions
jobs.description: Find your next opportunity and join our growing team
jobs.unavailable: Not accepting applications at this time

listings.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
listings.description: Build scalable enterprise applications using React, Node.js, and cloud technologies.

listings.title: DevOps Engineer
listings.description: Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and monitoring systems.

listings.title: AI/ML Engineer
listings.description: Develop machine learning models and AI solutions for enterprise clients.

listings.title: Product Designer
listings.description: Create beautiful, intuitive user experiences for complex enterprise applications.

listings.title: Solutions Architect
listings.description: Design end-to-end technical solutions and guide clients through digital transformation.

listings.title: Technical Writer
listings.description: Create comprehensive documentation, tutorials, and technical content.

cta.title: Questions About Working Here?
cta.description: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out and we'll answer any questions about life at Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Explore how we've helped companies across industries transform operations through practical, high-impact technology.

items.title: Cloud Migration & Modernization
items.description: Migrated legacy banking systems to AWS cloud infrastructure with zero downtime.
items.challenge: Legacy monolithic architecture causing scalability issues
items.result: Successfully migrated to microservices on AWS

items.title: AI-Powered Diagnostic Platform
items.description: Built ML models for medical image analysis with 95%+ accuracy.
items.challenge: Manual diagnostic processes taking too long

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
items.description: Developed BI platform processing 10M+ events daily.
items.challenge: No real-time visibility into key business metrics

faqs.question: What services does Horizon Tech offer?
faqs.answer: We provide custom software development, AI/ML solutions, cloud architecture, DevOps, business intelligence, and IoT services.

faqs.question: How do I start a project with Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Contact us via form or email with your requirements. We'll schedule a discovery call and share a proposal.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer support and maintenance packages that include bug fixes, security updates, and feature improvements.

education.subtitle: Guides, tutorials, and best practices from the Horizon Tech team

hub.description: Explore our curated technical resources across cloud, AI/ML, DevOps, and modern software development.
hub.note: These materials are based on real project experience and updated regularly.
